channel.title: themes on Vasile Câmpeanu's Porfolio & Blog
channel.description: Recent content in themes on Vasile Câmpeanu's Porfolio & Blog

item.title: Code Block
item.description: <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="utf-8" /> <title>Example HTML5 Document</title> <meta name="description" content="Sample article showcasing basic Markdown syntax and formatting for HTML elements."> </head> <body> <p>Test</p> </body> </html>

item.title: Markdown Syntax Guide
item.description:
Hello

This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.
